title: Unlimited Tools MCP gateway config
description: Upstream list for `unlimited-skills mcp gateway --config`. Upstreams are stdio subprocesses only (no network transports, no OAuth in v1), spawned lazily on first tools_schema/tools_call need, kept alive for reuse, and terminated on gateway shutdown.

name.description: Unique upstream id. Tools are addressed as '<name>.<tool>'.

command.description: Executable to spawn for this upstream MCP server.

env.description: Extra environment variables for the upstream process. Values may reference local environment variables (%VAR% or $VAR); they are expanded from os.environ at spawn time and are never written to any log.

tools.description: Optional pre-declared tool index (names and descriptions only) so tools_search can match this upstream before it is ever spawned.
